osisText.div: Toward Corinthians, AlphaPaul, called[adjective] sent-off[one] of{Jesus Anointed} through of{will-effect} of{God}, and Sosthenes, the brother, to{the out-calling of{the God}, the being} in to{Corinth}, to{[the] having-been-holy-ized in to{Anointed Jesus}, called[adjective] holy} together-with to{all the calling-upon-selves} the name of{the Lord of{us}, Jesus Anointed} in to{every place} both of{same[plural]} and of{us}, Grace/favor to{you} and peace from of{God, Father} of{us} and of{Lord Jesus Anointed}. I-am-well-favoring/giving-thanks to{the God} of{me} always about of{you} upon to{the grace/favor, the given} of{the God} to{you} in to{Anointed Jesus}, that in to{every[thing]} you-are-rich-ized/enriched in to{same} in to{every word/account/reckoning} and to{every knowledge}, according-as the witness of{the Anointed} is-confirmed in to{you}, such-as you to_not_be-being-deficient-ed, in to{not-one grace/favor-effect}, receiving-out-off/away the off-cover-sis[i.e. state of uncovering]/revelation of{the Lord of{us}, Jesus Anointed}, who also will-confirm you until of{completion} without-call-in/charge/indictment in to{the day} of{the Lord of{us}, Jesus Anointed}. The God [is] faithful through of{whom} you-are-called into common-ia/association/participation/partnership of{the Son of{same}, Jesus Anointed, the Lord} of{us}. Moreover, I-am-calling-aside you, brothers, through of{the name} of{the Lord of{us}, Jesus Anointed}, in-which-place all[you] may-be-saying the same and it-may_not_be-being in to{you} split-effects; moreover, you-may-be-being having-been-fit-ized-down/adjusted/equipped in to{the same mind/thinking} and in to{the same knowing[noun]}, for it-is-evident-ed to{me} about of{you}, brothers of{me}, under of{the[plural]} of{Chloe}, that quarrels are-being in to{you}. Moreover, I-am-saying the-same, that each of{you} is-saying, on-one-hand, "I am-being of{Paul}," on-the-other-hand, "I of{Apollos}," on-the-another-hand, "I of{Cephas}," on-the-another-hand, "I of{Anointed}." The Anointed has-been-divided[?] No, Paul is-crucified over/for-the-sake of{you}[?] Or, into the name of{Paul} you-are-immersed[?] I-am-well-favoring/giving-thanks to{the God} that I-immerse not-one of{you} if not Crispus and Gaius, in-which-place not any may-say that into the my name you-are-immersed. Moreover, I-immerse also the of{Stephanas} house. Remaining [time], I-have_not_beheld if I-immerse any other, for Anointed does_not_send-off/away me to-be-immersing; contrariwise, to-be-good-message-izing, not in to{wisdom} of{word}, in-which-place the cross of{the Anointed} would_not_be-emptied, for the word, the of{the cross}, on-one-hand, to{the[plural] perishing-off/away}, is-being fool-ia/folly; on-the-other-hand, to{the us being-saved} is-being enablement/empowerment of{God}, for it-has-been-written, "I-will-destroy-off/away the wisdom of{the[plural] wise} and I-will-un-place/reject the put-together-sis[i.e. state of comprehension/intelligence] of{the[plural] put-together/intelligent}." Where[?] [is the] wise[?] Where[?] [is the] scribe[?] Where[?] [is the] seek-together-er of{the eon, the-same}[?] Emphatically-not[?] the God makes-foolish the wisdom of{the world, the-same}[?], for upon-beheld[conjunction] in to{the wisdom} of{the God} the world does_not_know the God through of{the wisdom}, the God well-esteems through of{the fool-ia/folly} of{the proclaim-effect} to-save the[plural] believing, and upon-beheld[conjunction] Judeans are-giving-cause/requesting [a] sign and Greeks are-seeking wisdom. Moreover, we are-proclaiming Anointed having-been-crucified, on-one-hand to{Judeans} [a] scandal, on-the-other-hand to{nations} fool-ia/folly, on-the-another-hand to{the[plural] same called[adjective]} both to{Judeans} and to{Greeks}, Anointed, enablement/empowerment of{God} and wisdom of{God}, that the foolish of{the God} is-being wiser-than of{the men}, and the weak of{the God} stronger-than of{the men}, for you-are-viewing the call-sis[i.e. state of calling] of{you}, brothers, that not many [are] wise according-to flesh, not many [are] enabled/empowered[adjective], not many [are] well-become[adjective]; contrariwise, the God chooses the foolish of{the world} in-which-place he-may-be-shaming-down the wise, and the God chooses the weak of{the world} in-which-place he-may-be-shaming-down the strong, and the God chooses the[neuter plural] un-become of{the world} and the[neuter plural] having-been-nothing-ed-out/discounted, and the[neuter plural] not being, in-which-place he-would-unemploy/idle/disuse the[neuter plural] being, which-how every flesh would_not_boast in-sight of{the God}. Moreover, out of{same} you are-being in to{Anointed Jesus}, who is-become wisdom to{us} from of{God}, both[3x] justice-ness and holy-ization and loose-off/away-sis[i.e. state of being loosed off/away]/release-off/away, in-which-place according-as it-has-been-written, "The boasting: be-boasting in to{[the] Lord}," \c 2 and-I, come[ing] toward you, brothers, come not according-to have-over of{word} or of{wisdom}, messaging-according-to to{you} the witness of{the God}, for I-do_not_judge what[?] to-have-beheld in to{you} if not Jesus Anointed and the-same having-been-crucified, and-I become in to{weakness} and in to{fear} and in to{much trembling[noun]} toward you, and the word of{me} and the proclaim-effect of{me} not in to{persuasive words} of{man-ly[i.e. human] wisdom}; contrariwise, in to{show-off/away-sis[i.e. state of showing forth]/exhibition} of{[the] Spirit} and of{enablement/empowerment}, in-which-place the faith of{you} would_not_be-being in to{wisdom} of{men}; contrariwise, in to{enablement/empowerment} of{God}. Moreover, we-are-speaking wisdom in to{the[plural] accomplished[i.e. mature]}; moreover, wisdom not of{the eon, the-same}, nor of{the origins/originals/chiefs} of{the eon, the-same} of{the being-unemployed/idled/disused}. Contrariwise, we-are-speaking wisdom of{God} in to{[the] mystery}, the having-been-concealed-from, which the God predefines/designates before of{the eons} into esteem/glory of{us}, which not-one of{the originals/chiefs} of{the eon, the-same}, has-known, for supposing if they-know, they-do_not_crucify the Lord of{the esteem/glory}. Contrariwise, according-as it-has-been-written, "What[plural] [the] eye does_not_behold and [the] ear does_not_hear and upon [the] heart of{man} does_not_ascend, which[plural] the God prepares to{the[plural] loving} same." Moreover, the God off-covers/uncovers to{us} through of{the Spirit} of{same}, for the Spirit is-investigating all, also the depths of{the God}, for who[?] has-beheld of{men} the[plural] of{the man} if not the spirit of{the man}, the in to{same}[?] The-same-ly also not-one has-known the[plural] of{the God} if not the Spirit of{the God}. Moreover, we take not the spirit of{the world}; contrariwise, the Spirit, the out of{the God}, in-which-place we-may-have-beheld the[neuter plural] grace/favor-ized to{us} under of{the God}, which also we-are-speaking not in to{taught[adjective] words} of{man-ly[i.e. human] wisdom}; contrariwise, in to{taught[adjective]} of{[the] Spirit} together-judging spiritual to{spiritual}. Moreover, [the] life-y[adjective] man is_not_receiving the[neuter plural] of{the Spirit} of{the God}, for it-is-being fool-ia/folly to{same}, and he-is_not_being-enabled/empowered to-know that spiritually it-is-being-judged-anew. Moreover, the spiritual on-one-hand is-judging-anew all; on-the-other-hand, same is-being-judged-anew under of{not-one[masculine]}, for who[?] knows [the] mind/thinking of{[the] Lord}, who will-step-ize-together/derive/deduce/demonstrate same[?] Moreover, we are-having [the] mind/thinking of{Anointed}, \c 3 and-I, brothers, am_not_enabled to-speak to{you} as to{spiritual}; contrariwise, as to{fleshly}, as to{infant} in to{Anointed}. I-drink-ize you milk and not consume-effect[i.e. food], for not-yet you-have-been-being-enabled; contrariwise, nor still now you-are-being-enabled, for still you-are-being fleshly, for which-where zeal in to{you} and quarrel and two-stand-ias, emphatically-not[?] you-are-being fleshly and are-walking-around according-to man[?], for when-supposing someone may-be-saying, on-one-hand "I am-being of{Paul}," on-the-other-hand [a] different-other "I of{Apollos}," emphatically-not[?] you-are-being fleshly[?] So, who[?] is-being Paul[?] Moreover, who[?] Apollos[?] Servants through of{whom} you-believe and to{each} as the Lord gives. I plant, Apollos drink-izes[i.e. hydrates]; contrariwise, the God has-been-growing, such-as neither the planting is-being anything, nor the drink-izing[i.e. hydrating]; contrariwise, the growing God. Moreover, the planting and the drink-izing[i.e. hydrating] are-being one; moreover, each will-take/get the own wage according-to the own toil, for we-are-being together-workers of{God}. You-are-being workable-land of{God}, [a] house-build-ment of{God}. According-to the grace/favor of{the God}, the given to{me} as [a] wise original/chief-crafter/carpenter[translit. "architect"], I-have-placed [a] foundation; moreover, another is-house-building-upon; moreover, each: be-viewing how he-is-house-building-upon, for not-one is-being-enabled to-place another foundation aside the being-lain, who is-being Jesus, the Anointed. Moreover, if someone is-house-building-upon upon the foundation, the-same, gold, silver, valuable stones, wood[plural], grass, reed/stalk/straw, the work of{each} will-become revealed[adjective], for the day will-evident [it], that in to{fire} it-is-being-off-covered/uncovered and the work of{each}, which-about-what-such is-being, the fire will-esteem-ize/evaluate. If the work of{someone} is-remaining, which he-house-builds, he-will-take/get wage. If the work of{someone} will-be-burned-down, he-will-be-penalized. Moreover, same will-be-saved; moreover, the-same-ly as through of{fire}. You-have_not_beheld that you-are-being [the] temple of{God} and the Spirit of{the God} is-housing in to{you}. If someone is-ruining the temple of{the God}, the God will-ruin the-same, for the temple of{the God} is-being holy, the-who are-being you. No-one: be-deceiving/defrauding-out sameself. If someone is-esteeming to-be-being wise in to{you} in to{the eon, the-same}, [he:] be-become foolish, in-which-place he-may-become wise, for the wisdom of{the world, the-same,} is-being fool-ia/folly aside/beside to{the God}, for it-has-been-written, "the grasping the wise in to{the all-working-ia/craftiness} of{same}," and again, "[The] Lord is-knowing the dialog-iz-ations" of{the wise}, "that they-are-being vain," such-as no-one: be-boasting in to{men}, for it-is-being all[neuter plural] of{you[plural]}, if-of Paul, if-of Apollos, if-of Cephas, if-of world, if-of being-alive[noun], if-of death, if-of having-stood-in/instituted, if-of about-to-be-being, all[neuter plural] of{you}. Moreover, you[plural] [are] of{Anointed}; moreover, Anointed [is] of{God}. \c 4 The-same-ly, [a] man: be-word-izing/reckoning/accounting-self us as subordinates of{Anointed} and house-legislators of{[the] mysteries} of{God}. Thus, [the] remaining[singular], be-seeking in to{the house-legislators}, in-which-place someone faithful may-be-discovered. Moreover, it-is-being into [the] least to{emphatically-me} in-which-place under of{you} I-may-be-judged-anew, or under of{man-ly[i.e. human] day}; contrariwise, neither I-am-judging_myself_anew, for I-have-beheld-together nothing to{myself}; contrariwise, I-have-been-justified not in to{the-same[neuter]}; moreover, the judging-anew me is-being [the] Lord, such-as, be-judging something not before of{season}, until supposing the Lord may-come, who also will-light-ize the[plural] hidden[adjective] of{the darkness} and will-reveal the intentions of{the hearts}, and then the praise-upon will-become to{each} from of{the God}. Moreover, brothers, I-change/across-decorum-effect-ize/transfigure the-same[plural] into myself and Apollos through you, in-which-place in to{us} you-may-learn the not over what[plural] it-has-been-written to-be-considering/deeming, in-which-place not one over of{the one} you-may-be-being-inflated according-to of{the different-other}, for who[?] is-through-judging/discriminating you[?] Moreover, what[?] you-are-having which you-do_not_take[?] Moreover, if also you-take, what[?] you-are-boasting as not take[ing][?] Already you-are-being having-been-satiated. Already you-are-rich. Apart-from of{us} you-reign, and owed/ought yet you-reign in-which-place also we may-reign-together to{you}, for I-am-esteeming [that] the God shows-off/away us, the last sent-off[one]s, as upon-dead, that we-are-become theater to{the world} and to{messengers} and to{men}, we foolish through Anointed, moreover you prudent in to{Anointed}, we weak, moreover you strong, you in-esteem-ious/glorious, moreover we unvalued. Even-to of{the hour} presently also we-are-hungering, and we-are-thirsting, and we-are-being-naked, and we-are-being-buffet-ized, and we-are-without-stand-ing[i.e. wandering/unsettled], and we-are-toiling, work-izing-selves to{the own hands}, being-insulted, we-are-good-word-ing, being-chased, we-are-being-held-up/anew, being-evil-asserted, we-are-calling-aside, as cleanse-around-effects[i.e. resulting refuse/trash/filth] of{the world} we-are-become of{all}, rub/grate/scour-around-effect[i.e. resulting dirt/scrapings] until presently. Not in-turning/introspecting you I-am-writing the-same; contrariwise, as beloved offsprings of{me} I-am-placing-in-mind/exhorting, for if-supposing you-may-be-having ten-thousand child-leaders[i.e. leaders of children] in to{Anointed}; contrariwise, not many fathers, for in to{Anointed Jesus} through of{the good-message} I beget you. So, I-am-calling-aside you; be-becoming imitators of{me}. Through the-same, I-dispatch Timothy to{you}, who is-being offspring of{me}, beloved and faithful in to{[the] Lord}, who will-remind-anew you the ways of{me}, the in to{Anointed Jesus}, according-as everywhere I-am-teaching in to{every out-calling}. Moreover, as not of{me being-come} toward you some are-inflated; moreover, I-will-be-come speedily toward you, if-supposing the Lord may-will, and I-will-know/be-known not the word of{the[plural] having-been-inflated}; contrariwise, the enablement/empowerment, for the kingdom of{the God} [is] not in to{word}; contrariwise, in to{enablement/empowerment}. What[?] you-are-willing[?] I-may-come in to{staff} toward you, or in to{love}, besides to{spirit} of{meekness}. \c 5 Wholly/altogether sexual-immorality is-being-heard in to{you}, and to-which-the-same sexual-immorality not-moreover which-what is-being-name-ized in to{the nations}, such-as some woman to-be-having of{the father}, and you are-being having-been-inflated, and emphatically-not more you-mourn, in-which-place the do[ing] the work, the-same, would-be-lifted out of{midst} of{you}, for I, on-one-hand, as being-off/away to{the body}, on-the-other-hand being-beside to{the spirit}, already have-judged as being-beside the work-ize[ing]-self-down/according-to the-same the-same-ly, in to{the name} of{the Lord of{us}, Jesus Anointed}, of{you gathered} and of{the spirit} of{emphatically-me} together-with to{the enablement/empowerment} of{the Lord of{us}, Jesus}, to-give-aside/deliver the to-whom-the-same to{the Satan/adversary} into destruction of{the flesh}, in-which-place the spirit may-be-saved in to{the day} of{the Lord of{us}, Jesus Anointed}. The boast-effect of{you} [is] not good. You-have_not_beheld that [a] little leaven is-leavening the whole mix/knead-effect. So, clean/purge-out the old leaven, in-which-place you-may-be-being fresh mix/knead-effect, according-as you-are-being unleavened, for also the passover of{us} over/for-the-sake of{us}, Anointed, is-sacrificed, such-as we-may-be-festival-izing/celebrating not in to{old leaven}, nor in to{leaven} of{bad-ia} and of{evil-ia}; contrariwise, in to{unleavened} of{sincerity} and of{truth}. I-write to{you} in to{the send-upon[i.e. communication]} not to-be-mixing/being-mixed-anew-together to{sexual-immoral-ers}, and not all to{the sexual-immoral-ers} of{the world, the-same} or to{the much-more-having-ers} and to{snatching[adjective]}, or to{idol-employers}, upon-if you-have-been-owing consequently to-come-out out of{the world}. Moreover, now I-write to{you} not to-be-mixing/being-mixed-anew-together if-supposing someone being-name-ized "brother" may-be-being sexual-immoral-er, or much-more-having-er, or idol-employer, or insulter, or drunkard, or snatching[adjective], nor-moreover to{the to-whom-the-same} to-be-eating-together, for what[?] to{me} the[plural] outside to-be-judging[?] Emphatically-not; the[plural] within, you be-judging. Moreover, the God will-judge the[plural] outside. Lift-out the evil out of{same you}. \c 6 Who[?] of{you} is-daring having practice-effect toward the different-other to-be-being-judged upon of{the[plural] unjust} and emphatically-not upon of{the[plural] holy}[?] Or you-have_not_beheld that the[plural] holy will-judge the world[?], and if in to{you} the world is-being-judged, you-are-being un-worthwhile of{[the] least means/standards-of-judgments[translit. "criterion(s)"]}[?] You-have_not_beheld that we-will-judge messengers[?] No-what[?] yet [the] livelihood-ish[?] So, on-the-other-hand, if-supposing you-may-be-having [the] livelihood-ish means/standards-of-judgments[translit. "criteria"], the having-been-nothing-ed-out/discounted in to{the out-calling}, you-are-sitting-down/seating the-same[plural][?] Toward turn-in[i.e. self-reflection] to{you} I-am-saying the-same-ly [a] wise nor one who will-enable-self to-deliberate/discriminate anew is_not_being-in in to{you} amidst of{the brother} of{same}[?] Contrariwise, brother alongside of{brother} is-being-judged, and the-same upon of{unbelieving[adjective]}. So, by-contrast, already wholly it-is-being [a] yield/inferior-effect to{you} that you-are-having judge-effects/judgments alongside of{sameselves}. Through what[?] Emphatically-not[?] more you-are-being-done-injustice/injured[?] Through what[?] Emphatically-not[?] more you-are-being-deprived-off/away-from[?] Contrariwise, you are-doing-injustice/injuring and are-depriving-off/away-from, and the-same [to] brothers. Or you-have_not_beheld that [the] unjust will_not_inherit [the] kingdom of{God}[?] Do_not_be-being-led-astray. Neither sexual-immoral-ers, nor idol-employers, nor adulterers, nor soft[masculine]/effeminate/wimpy, nor male-[marriage/family]bed-ers[i.e. homosexuals], nor thieves, nor much-more-having-ers, nor drunkards, not insulting[adjective], not snatching[adjective], will_not_inherit [the] kingdom of{God}, and some[you] have-been-being the-same. Contrariwise you-bathe-selves-off/away, contrariwise you-are-holy-ized; contrariwise you-are-justified in to{the name} of{the Lord of{us}, Jesus Anointed} and in to{the Spirit} of{the God} of{us}. All to{me} is-being-permitted; contrariwise, not all is-carrying/bearing-together[i.e. compatible/harmonious/synergetic]. All to{me} is-being-permitted; contrariwise, I will_not_be-authority-ized under of{anything}. The consume-effects[i.e. food] to{the cavity-ia} and the cavity-ia to{the consume-effects[i.e. food]}; moreover, the God will-unemploy/idle/disuse also the-same[singular] and the-same[plural]; moreover, the body not to{the sexual-immorality}; contrariwise to{the Lord}, and the Lord to{the body}. Moreover, the God also rouses the Lord, and he-will-rouse-out us through of{the empowerment} of{same}. You-have_not_beheld that the bodies of{you[plural]}, it-is-being members of{Anointed}. So, lift[ing] the members of{the Anointed}, I-would-make members of{[a] sexual-immoral-er}[?] It-could_not_become. Or you-have_not_beheld that the being-adhered to{the sexual-immoral-er} is-being one body[?], for he-is-asserting, "The two will-be into one flesh." Moreover, the adhering to{the Lord} is-being one spirit. Be-fleeing the sexual-immorality. Every sin-effect which if-supposing [a] man may-do is-being without[i.e. outside] of{the body}; moreover, the being-sexually-immoral is-sinning into the own body. Or you-have_not_beheld that the body of{you[plural]} is-being [a] temple of{the Holy Spirit} in to{you[plural]}, of{whom} you-are-having from of{God}, and you-are_not_being of{sameselves}[?], for you-are-purchased of{value[i.e. price]}. At-this-juncture esteem-ize/glorify the God in to{the body} of{you[plural]} and in to{the Spirit} of{you[plural]}, the-which[neuter plural] is-being of{the God}. \c 7 Moreover, about of{which[plural]} you-write to{me}, good to{[a] man} of{[a] woman} not to-be-being-taken-hold. Moreover, through the sexual-immoralities, each[masculine]: be-having the of{sameself} woman, and each[feminine]: be-having the own man. The man: be-giving-off/away the owed[noun] to{the woman}. Moreover, similarly, also the woman to{the man}. The woman is_not_authority-izing of{the own body}; contrariwise, the man. Moreover, similarly, also the man is_not_authority-izing of{the own body}; contrariwise, the woman. Do_not_be-depriving-off/away-from one-another, if not-what supposing out of{sound-together-ful/harmonious/accordant} toward season, in-which-place you-may-be-being-vacant to{the prayer}, and again upon the same you-may-be-being, in-which-place the Satan/adversary may_not_be-trial-izing you through the intemperance of{you[plural]}. Moreover, I-am-saying the-same according-to together-knowing/understanding[noun], not according-to set-upon[noun], for I-am-will-ing all men to-be-being as also myself; contrariwise, each is-having own grace/favor-effect out of{God}, on-one-hand who the-same-ly, on-the-other-hand who the-same-ly. Moreover, I-am-saying to{the[plural] without-marriages} and to{the widows}, good to{same} if-supposing they-may-stay as also-I. Moreover, if they-are_not_mastering/controlling-selves: marry, for it-is-being more-mastering/controlling[adjective] to-marry than to-be-being-inflamed. Moreover, to{the[plural] having-married}, I-am-messaging-aside, not I, contrariwise the Lord, woman from of{man} not to-be-separated. Moreover, and if-supposing she-may-be-separated: be-staying without-marriage or be-altered-according-to/reconciled to{the man}, and man, woman not to-be-letting-off/away. Moreover, to{the remaining} I am-saying, not the Lord, if some brother is-having [an] unbelieving/unfaithful woman and same[feminine] is-well-esteeming-together to-be-housing alongside of{same[masculine]}, [he:] do_not_be-letting-off/away same[feminine], and [a] woman, the-who is-having [an] unbelieving/unfaithful man and the-same[masculine] is-well-esteeming-together to-be-housing alongside of{same[feminine]}, [she:] do_not_be-letting-off/away the man, for the man, the unbelieving/unfaithful, has-been-holy-ized in to{the woman}, and the woman, the unbelieving/unfaithful, has-been-holy-ized in to{the man}. Upon-if of-consequence it-is-being the unclean offsprings of{you}, moreover now it-is-being holy. Moreover, if the unbelieving/unfaithful is-separating-self, [he/she:] be-being-separated.
